summary: Full backend + frontend test of Team Task Manager. All 24 backend pytest cases pass (100%). All critical frontend flows pass (login/admin+member, demo autofill, dashboard stats, project CRUD via modal, project detail members-list/add-member/task board 3 columns, create task modal, set-status pills, delete-task, role-based hiding of admin buttons, logout). No functional issues found.

minor.issue: Email is silently lowercased by backend but response does not signal this to client; harmless but worth documenting in API contract.
When a member sends non-status fields, backend silently filters them and returns 200. Considered good UX but arguably should 403 on attempted privilege escalation. Non-blocking.

issues: React console warning: '<span> cannot be a child of <option>'. Caused by dev-time instrumentation wrapping option children in spans. Not a functional bug but produces a hydration warning in the console.

action_items: Optional: clarify API docs that emails are lowercased on signup/login.
Optional: return 403 (not 200) when a non-admin attempts to PUT /api/tasks/{id} with non-status fields.
Optional: silence the <option><span> React hydration warning surfaced by dev instrumentation in ProjectDetail AddMemberRow (not user-visible).
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is 617 lines in one module; acceptable for MVP but consider splitting into routers (auth/projects/tasks/dashboard) once >700 lines.
CORS defaults to '*' with allow_credentials=True; browsers ignore credentials with wildcard but this is an insecure default. Pin origins for production.
JWT_SECRET is committed in /app/backend/.env; fine for dev, rotate before deploy.
All MongoDB reads use projection {'_id': 0} — good.
dashboard_stats.member branch uses $or of assigned_to OR project membership, so a member sees tasks for every project they belong to (not just assigned) — matches spec.
Frontend uses Bearer token in localStorage (acceptable for this MVP). Axios interceptor (not viewed) assumed to attach it — confirmed working via all successful API calls in UI tests.
seed_data_creation: Test suite creates TEST_-prefixed projects/tasks and deletes them within each test. UI test created 'UI_TEST_Project' which persists in DB (admin can clean up).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend pytest suite at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py (uses REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL env var). Seed admin/member accounts are auto-created on backend startup. A leftover 'UI_TEST_Project' may exist — harmless but can be deleted by admin. Role-based hiding of open-create-project / open-create-task / delete-task-* / remove-member-* / add-member-select is confirmed working for member role.
